utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package contains all 7 of these items. Each item is fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic) is clear; travel_dates (July 10–14, 2024) are specific; transportation includes flight details, route, costs, and class; accommodation specifies hotel type, location, cost, amenities, and rating; activities are listed with costs and total for family; additional_services include restaurant recommendations with names and cuisine types; total_budget provides a complete cost breakdown. Therefore, all items are covered and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic' (destination rating = 7), transportation 'Budget airline flights... economy class' (budget_airlines → Economy Class rating = 6), accommodation '4-star hotel (property_option62)... guest rating 8.8' (matches Family Haven Hotel which also has 8.8 guest rating, rating = 9), activities include 'Walking tour with guide (€20 per person)' (City Walking Tour, rating = 9) and 'Entertainment activity (€25 per person)' (best match in activities is Street Art Tour, price €25, rating = 8). Additional services mention 'Restaurant recommendations: Mediterranean cuisine (restaurant_option39)' (matches Lebanese Restaurant or Middle Eastern Grill, both Mediterranean, rating = 9) and 'Italian trattoria (restaurant_option38)' (Italian Trattoria, rating = 9).
